THE AUTOMATION CEILING

## Your customers move in real time. Your inflexible infrastructure can’t keep up.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Container-3.png)

### Delayed response

Systems respond too late, causing you to miss the peak window of customer intent.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Container-1.png)

### Fragmented experiences

Messages fail to reflect recent actions, creating a disjointed story as customers move across channels.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Container-2.png)

### Journey paralysis

Teams spend more time managing workflows than they do improving performance or driving results.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-nova-decisioning.webp)

NOVA DECISIONING

## Turn intent into intelligent engagement.

Don’t let high-value moments slip away. Iterable turns live customer signals  
into instant action. With Nova Intelligence, timing, content, and channel are  
continuously optimized for every individual to maximize conversion.

visual studio

## One Visual Studio. Every channel connected.

Build seamless paths across email, SMS, push, and in-app from a single  
studio. Our visual journey builder provides a single source of truth,  
ensuring your messaging remains cohesive as customers switch devices.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-visual-studio-1.webp)

journey agent

## Scale dynamic orchestration without technical friction.

Remove the technical barriers to growth. Build, test, and update nuanced customer workflows without SQL or custom code. Marketers gain full control to launch new ideas in minutes, not weeks.

## Guide every customer through the lifecycle.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-drive-adoption.webp)

### Drive adoptionfrom the start.

Trigger personalized onboarding paths based on real-time feature engagement. If a user stalls, automatically pivot the journey to offer the specific support they need to move forward.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-loyalty-1.png)

### Strengthen loyaltyas behavior shifts.

Move beyond ‘batch and blast’. Deliver lifecycle journeys that adapt to changing preferences over time, increasing long-term LTV by staying relevant to every customer’s evolving needs.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-reactivate-interest.webp)

### Reactivate interestbefore it fades.

Identify the earliest signs of disengagement. Automatically trigger targeted win-back journeys across the channels where your customers are most likely to respond, bringing them back into the lifecycle.

## Everything your team needs to build adaptive journeys at scale.

Collapse the distance between data and action with an architecture designed for the speed of modern customer engagement.

### Real-time, adaptive logic

Move past ‘if/then’ rules. Iterable turns live behavioral signals into instant action, so journeys adapt to the individual in milliseconds.

### Fluid journey design

Build enterprise-ready programs without fragile logic. Update flows in real-time without needing to rebuild your entire strategy.

### Unified cross-channel unity

Coordinate email, SMS, and push from one heart. Native integrations ensure every touchpoint stays connected, eliminating disconnected experiences.

### Marketer-driven agility

Launch and optimize without engineering support. Iterable combines back-end power with a front-end designed for rapid iteration.
